intellectual_property.original_game: Idle Bounty Adventures by Post Physical Games
intellectual_property.status: Abandoned since ~2021, no active trademark enforcement observed
intellectual_property.our_approach: Inspired by mechanics, NOT a direct copy. All assets, code, story are original.
intellectual_property.asset_policy: AI-generated or custom-created assets only - no extraction from original APK
intellectual_property.name: Idle Kingdom Revolution is original branding
intellectual_property.mechanics_copyright: Game mechanics cannot be copyrighted - only expression (art, code, story)

privacy_policy_requirements.cookies: Essential only (auth token), analytics cookies with consent

terms_of_service.user_generated_content: No UGC in MVP - all content is developer-created
terms_of_service.account_termination: Reserve right to terminate for cheating or abuse
terms_of_service.virtual_goods: All in-game purchases are virtual goods, no real money value
terms_of_service.refund_policy: No refunds for virtual currency (consistent with platform policies)

monetization_compliance.current_phase: No real money transactions (placeholder shop only)

future_iap.gambling: Avoid mechanics that could be classified as gambling

ads.children: No ads if targeting under-13 audience

regulations.gdpr: EU players - right to data export, erasure, consent management
regulations.ccpa: California players - right to know, delete, opt-out
regulations.coppa: No data collection from under-13 without parental consent
regulations.app_stores: If native app later - comply with Apple/Google review guidelines
